title: buddleja normaniae
intro: Buddleja normaniae, also known as the mountain fountain plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Buddleja normaniae include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Buddleja normaniae are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
